## How to test

1. `bun install --frozen-lockfile`
2. `bun run check`
3. `bun test`
4. `bun run test:e2e` (Postgres + `.env.test` as in [`docs/archiqueture/getting-started.md`](docs/archiqueture/getting-started.md))
